name: syncora
description: Syncora - CRM SaaS orienté opérations terrain (monorepo TypeScript).

scripts.backend: docker compose up -d --wait && npm run backend:run
scripts.backend:run: wait-on -t 60000 tcp:localhost:27017 && concurrently -n org,users,permissions,fleet,dossiers,stock,gateway "npm run start:dev -w @syncora/organizations-service" "npm run start:dev -w @syncora/users-service" "npm run start:dev -w @syncora/permissions-service" "npm run start:dev -w @syncora/fleet-service" "npm run start:dev -w @syncora/cases-service" "npm run start:dev -w @syncora/stock-service" "npm run start:dev -w @syncora/api-gateway"
